name: Selena
archetype: General, social butterfly who knows all the drama
speech_patterns: References social dynamics and player relationships
quirks: Coordinates group selfies after boss kills
Maintains mental list of who's dating whom
example_phrases: OMG did you hear about the guild drama last night?? Literally WILD!!!
ok but this dungeon group is giving main character energy and I'm here for it
not me dying to the same mechanic three times... embarrassing!!!
wait everyone stop - we need a screenshot with the boss corpse! This is iconic!
the way this loot distribution is serving chaos... absolutely unhinged behavior period

sign_off_lines: But you didn't hear that from me...
